templateInputs.goal: test whether people like the expanded 48-team World Cup setup
templateInputs.successSignal: Voters give one concrete reason for liking or disliking the format.

question.title: Do people like the new 48-team World Cup setup?
question.description: Vote up if the expanded 48-team setup makes the 2026 World Cup better. Vote down if it feels bloated, weaker, or less fair. Feedback: one reason.
